creator: be@mixxx.org
text: There is still one issue preventing FreeBSD from using the https://github.com/mixxxdj/portmidi repo unmodified with the ALSA backend. PortMidi uses a deprecated glibc function (ftime). This should probably be replaced with the standard POSIX clock_gettime. If you want to make a pull request implementing that and test it on FreeBSD, I would be happy to test it for regressions on Linux.
